label: Checkbox
description: A boolean (true/false) field rendered as a checkbox on forms.

label: Long Text
description: A large text field storing up to 100,000 characters. Use for lengthy plain-text content.

label: Currency
description: A monetary value field. Automatically formatted with the subsidiary's base currency symbol.

label: Date
description: A calendar date field (no time component). Displayed according to the user's locale date format.

label: Date / Time
description: A combined date and time field. Values are stored in UTC and displayed in the user's timezone.

label: Date / Time with Timezone
description: A date and time field that stores and displays timezone information alongside the value.

label: File (Document)
description: A reference to a file stored in the NetSuite File Cabinet. Renders as a file link on forms.

label: Email Address
description: A single-line text field validated to the email address format (e.g. user@example.com).

label: Decimal Number
description: A floating-point number field. Use for quantities, rates, and values requiring decimal precision.

label: Help Text (Display Only)
description: A display-only field that renders inline help text on the form. Stores no data.

label: Image
description: A reference to an image in the NetSuite File Cabinet. The image is rendered inline on the record form.

label: Inline HTML
description: A display-only field that renders arbitrary HTML content inline on the form. Stores no data.

label: Integer
description: A whole number field. Decimal values are not allowed. Use for counts, quantities without fractions, etc.

label: Multi-Select List
description: Allows the user to select multiple values from a list or record type. Use sourceList or sourceFrom to specify the source.

label: Percent
description: A numeric field displayed as a percentage. The value 25 is stored and displayed as 25%.

label: Phone Number
description: A text field formatted as a phone number. Provides phone-number-specific input formatting.

label: Rich Text
description: A full rich text editor field (WYSIWYG). Stores HTML. Allows bold, italic, lists, hyperlinks, images, etc.

label: List / Record (Select)
description: A dropdown field referencing a custom list or a record type. Set sourceList for a custom list, or sourceFrom for a record type.

label: Free-Form Text
description: A single-line plain text field. Stores up to 300 characters. The most commonly used field type.

label: Text Area
description: A multi-line plain text area. Stores up to 4,000 characters.

label: Time of Day
description: A time field storing hours and minutes (no date). Displayed in HH:MM AM/PM format.

label: Hyperlink (URL)
description: A text field validated as a URL. Rendered as a clickable hyperlink on the record form.
